title: Migrate the Rossovia workbench entry to Bun

mainline.contradiction: Move the high-frequency workbench runtime into the project TypeScript/Bun execution stack while preserving project identity and resolution behavior and correcting the conflation of user/project preference scope with machine-local environment state.
acceptance: A Bun workbench entry matches the verified identity and resolution behavior on retained fixtures, uses one explicit user preference source with optional project scope and no machine preference source, and supports an evidence-backed cutover plan; unrelated maintenance scripts remain outside scope.
